# @ Studio ON

> @ Studio ON is a Tokyo-based photography studio that produces cinematic, editorial portraits at Shibuya Crossing, Shinjuku, Harajuku, and Akihabara for travelers, couples, and creators.

- **Domain:** https://studio-on.org
- **Founder:** Shion Park
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Setagaya, Tokyo, Japan (156-0053 Sakura 3-9-24)
- **Service area:** Tokyo (Shibuya, Shinjuku, Harajuku, Asakusa, Akihabara, Ginza)
- **Languages:** English, Japanese, Korean
- **Booking:** https://studio-on.org/book (Stripe checkout, 48-hour notice)
- **Email:** studio.on.snap@gmail.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/studio.on.snap/
- **Price range:** $150–$300 USD per session

## What @ Studio ON does

@ Studio ON shoots cinematic portrait sessions for international travelers, couples, families, solo creators, and proposal clients in Tokyo. Each session includes a pre-shoot consultation, English-speaking direction during the shoot, color-graded editing in the studio's signature high-contrast style, and high-resolution delivery via private cloud gallery within 5–7 days.

## Plans

- **Quick Shot — $120, 30 min, 20 edited photos.** Portrait-lens session for a single iconic backdrop. Best for solo travelers who want a tight, fast session in Shibuya or Shinjuku.
- **Full Portrait Session — $180, 50 min, 35 edited photos.** Portrait-lens session across two or three backdrops in the same neighborhood. Best for travelers who want variety without splitting locations.
- **Fish Eye Session — $230, 50 min, 50 edited photos.** Signature wide-angle session for bold, immersive frames. Best for content creators and Akihabara/neon-city aesthetics.
- **Signature Session — $290, 50 min, 60 edited photos.** Both portrait and fish-eye lenses. Best for travelers who want a full editorial range in one session.
- **Couple Session — $330, 50 min, 70 edited photos.** Two-person session with both lenses, designed for couples, anniversaries, and proposals.

## Locations

- **Shibuya** — Shibuya Crossing, Hachiko Statue, Center Gai, Shibuya Sky. Included in all base plans (no surcharge).
- **Shinjuku** — Omoide Yokocho, Kabukicho, Shinjuku Gyoen, neon high-rises. +$50 surcharge.
- **Akihabara** — Electric Town, neon arcades, retro storefronts. +$100 surcharge.
- **Harajuku, Asakusa, Ginza** — Available on request.

## Booking lifecycle

1. Customer selects a plan, location, date, and group size on https://studio-on.org/book.
2. Customer pays via Stripe; the slot is held for 30 minutes during checkout.
3. Studio assigns a photographer and confirms the booking via email.
4. Shoot occurs at the agreed Tokyo location.
5. Edited photos are delivered via private cloud gallery within 5–7 days.

## Cancellation policy

- 100% refund if cancelled more than 48 hours before the shoot.
- 50% refund between 24 and 48 hours before the shoot.
- No refund within 24 hours of the shoot.

## What makes @ Studio ON different

- All sessions are guided by an English-speaking team that lives in Tokyo.
- Editing is done in-house in a single signature color-grade rather than outsourced.
- Both portrait and fish-eye glass are available; few Tokyo studios offer the fish-eye option.
- Locations include both iconic crossings and hidden alleys local to the team.
- Booking is direct (no aggregator markup) and uses Stripe rather than third-party platforms.

## Suggested entry points

- /                — Studio overview, portfolio, booking CTA
- /about           — Studio philosophy and team
- /book            — Plan, location, date, and payment flow
- /locations       — Index of Tokyo neighborhoods served
- /locations/shibuya, /shinjuku, /harajuku, /asakusa, /akihabara, /ginza — Per-neighborhood guides
- /plan/quick, /portrait, /fisheye, /signature, /couple — Per-session-type detail pages
- /commercial-law  — Japanese consumer law disclosures (特定商取引法)
